parsed_output.justification: Daniel is the most suspicious player as he is the only one who refuses to claim a role, stating he 'doesn't have a good answer' when asked. This evasion is a common tactic for Werewolves who wish to avoid committing to a specific lie. While Kevin's claim to be the Troublemaker is logically flawed (claiming to swap himself), Daniel's complete lack of a claim and his deceptive behavior, as noted by Kaelan, make him the most likely Werewolf.
